# Aksa
> A tiny programming language for kids — keywords, builtins, and error messages all come from a locale dictionary (English and Indonesian today). Runs in the browser via WebAssembly and deploys to real ESP32 boards. Aksabot is the upcoming hardware kit built on the same language.

Every page is also available in Indonesian under the /id/ prefix.

## Start Here
- [Introduction](https://docs.aksabot.com/)
- [Getting Started](https://docs.aksabot.com/getting-started)

## Language
- [Overview](https://docs.aksabot.com/language/overview)

- [Types & Values](https://docs.aksabot.com/language/types)
- [Control Flow](https://docs.aksabot.com/language/control-flow)
- [Functions](https://docs.aksabot.com/language/functions)
- [Grammar](https://docs.aksabot.com/language/grammar)
